sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105163" key="tri/pokos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐ´-ποκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n105163.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with triple</tr_> (i. e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thick</tr_>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wool,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0066.tlg001:2:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dicaearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
